title: Apply black/red theme, update pricing in INR, add phone number, remove address, set working hours

requirements.text: Update the visual theme across the entire website to use a black and red color combination. Replace the existing amber/gold accent colors with bold red tones, keeping dark black/charcoal backgrounds. Apply this change consistently to all components: Navbar, Hero, Services, About, Contact, Footer, and any accent elements such as borders, buttons, highlights, and icons.

quotes: make the text and background a combination of black and red

acceptanceCriteria: Primary accent color is red (not amber/gold) throughout the site
All CTA buttons, borders, highlights, and icons use the red accent color
Theme is applied consistently across Navbar, Hero, Services, About, Contact, and Footer

requirements.text: Update the Services section pricing to reflect Indian Rupee (₹) amounts: Basic Exterior Wash at ₹599, Interior + Exterior at ₹1499, and Bike Wash at ₹299. Replace any existing pricing labels on service cards with these new values. Ensure all currency symbols use the Indian Rupee symbol (₹), not dollars or other currencies.

quotes: add pricing as basic exterior wash Rs.599 ,interior + exterior Rs.1499 and bike wash Rs. 299
all currency should in indian currency

acceptanceCriteria: Basic Exterior Wash is priced at ₹599
No dollar or other currency symbols appear anywhere on the page

requirements.text: Add the phone number +91 8527230903 to the Contact section's contact information area. Display it as a clickable tel: link. Remove any address or location fields/cards currently shown in the Contact section.
acceptanceCriteria: Phone number +91 8527230903 is visible in the Contact section
Phone number is a clickable tel: link
No address or location information is displayed in the Contact section

requirements.text: Display working hours in the Contact section as Monday to Sunday, 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM. This should replace any previously shown working hours or be added as a new working hours info card if none exist.

quotes: working hours monday to sunday timing 8 am to 4pm

acceptanceCriteria: Working hours are shown as Monday – Sunday, 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM
Working hours are clearly labeled in the Contact section
No conflicting or outdated hours are displayed

constraints: All currency must use the Indian Rupee symbol (₹)
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths)
nonGoals: Adding new service tiers beyond what is requested
Changing the layout or structure of the Services section beyond updating pricing
Adding email or SMS notification on form submission
